title: Audit and clean RPL Trickle implementation
description: Audit rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs, lichen-rpl crate, lichen-node integration for RPL trickle. Remove all TODOs, worker comments, dead code. Ensure exact match to spec pseudocode, no_std compliant. Cross-check lichen-core, Python equivalents. Verify with cargo check/tests. Parallel subagents where possible. Final summary only.
